name: Movie Club
description: Proposal template for choosing films, planning themed viewings, and capturing reactions or recommendations. Early idea only and meant to be customized.
author: ClawMax Team

communities.name: Movie Club
communities.description: Shared coordination space for movie club.

groups.name: Watchlist
groups.description: Film candidates, themes, and viewing priorities.

groups.name: Discussion
groups.description: Notes, reactions, and analysis after watching.

groups.name: Recommendations
groups.description: Future picks, rankings, and themed collections.

groups.name: Status
groups.description: Current cycle, next watch, and open decisions.

agents.name: Club Lead
agents.role: Viewing lead — defines the movie-night theme and what kind of discussion or output is wanted.

agents.name: Programmer
agents.role: Programming specialist — chooses films, sequencing, and themed watchlists.

agents.name: Discussion Host
agents.role: Discussion specialist — frames questions, reactions, and takeaways after each viewing.

agents.name: Recommendation Editor
agents.role: Recommendation specialist — turns reactions into future picks and ranked lists.

workflows.name: Movie Night Kickoff
workflows.content:
# Movie Night Kickoff

You are the Club Lead. The movie club just came online.

## Project Configuration
> **Customize these before applying:**

- **Theme or mood:** [classic, sci-fi, family, thriller, director study, custom]
- **Audience:** [solo, couple, family, club, custom]
- **Decision horizon:** [tonight, this week, long-term watchlist]
- **Output artifact:** [watchlist, ranked picks, discussion guide]

## Your Tasks
1. Define the viewing goal and constraints
2. Ask Programmer for the first set of picks
3. Ask Discussion Host for prompts or angles to watch for
4. Ask Recommendation Editor for what to queue next
5. Post the current watch plan to Status

workflows.name: Watchlist Refresh
workflows.content:
# Watchlist Refresh

1. Refresh the best current movie options for the chosen theme
2. Rank the top picks with quick reasoning
3. Suggest one wild card and one safe choice
4. Post the refreshed list to Watchlist
